sources.description: Turn this on to display the sources or references for the information the chatbot provides.

mode.description: Turn this on to have the chatbot give answers based on the provided documents, focusing only on those specific areas.

fileAccess.description: Turn this on to restrict member access to files uploaded in the workspace.

emailNotificationsDisabled.description: Turn this on to disable invitations to the members of this workspace via email.

advancedFileAnalysis.description: Unlock detailed file analysis with advanced scanning. Analyze up to 20 files at once and enable support for Excel files. Note: Display Sources will be disabled in this mode.

systemMessageOverride.description: If enabled, the workspace’s custom chat instructions are used without the default identity, language policy, or tone/detail instructions.

systemMessageOverride.note: When override is enabled, these chat instructions are primary.
systemMessageOverride.emptyWarning: Override is enabled but the chat instructions are empty. Tool instructions and policies will still apply, but there will be no base identity or language rules.
systemMessageOverride.disabledHint: Add chat instructions to enable override.
systemMessageOverride.toneLengthDisabled: Override is enabled, so tone of voice and response length are disabled.

confirmModal.title: Override Enabled With Empty Chat Instructions
confirmModal.message: Override is enabled but the chat instructions are empty. If you continue, the workspace will have no base identity, language policy, or tone/detail instructions. Do you want to continue?
